allowedNonLiteralExpressions.executionContract: one read-only schema-readiness probe per D1 binding
allowedNonLiteralExpressions.rationale: Production schema is migration-owned; the runtime now fails closed with one static readiness query instead of issuing 35 DDL queries on a cold isolate.

allowedNonLiteralExpressions.staticAuthority: server-owned forecastInvalidation chooses one of two fixed column-reset fragments
allowedNonLiteralExpressions.executionContract: single pending-trip update bound by id and authenticated user_id
allowedNonLiteralExpressions.rationale: No request value becomes SQL syntax; all user values remain D1 bindings.

allowedNonLiteralExpressions.staticAuthority: two fixed privacy-task SELECT literals chosen only by the optional operator job id
allowedNonLiteralExpressions.executionContract: internal cleanup claim of at most 5 rows
allowedNonLiteralExpressions.rationale: The branch changes only the bound predicate and ordering; the job id remains a parameter.

allowedNonLiteralExpressions.executionContract: one read-only schema-readiness probe per D1 binding when public discussions are enabled
allowedNonLiteralExpressions.rationale: Production discussion schema is migration-owned; the default-off runtime fails closed with one static readiness query instead of issuing table or index DDL on a cold isolate.

allowedNonLiteralExpressions.executionContract: one read-only schema-readiness probe per D1 binding
allowedNonLiteralExpressions.rationale: Production trip schema is migration-owned; the runtime fails closed with one static readiness query instead of issuing 35 DDL queries on a cold isolate.
The query shape is fixed and all record values are D1 bindings.

allowedNonLiteralExpressions.executionContract: single returned statement for an atomic trip batch
allowedNonLiteralExpressions.rationale: The query shape is fixed and all record values are D1 bindings.

allowedNonLiteralExpressions.rationale: The query shape is fixed and all record values are D1 bindings.

allowedNonLiteralExpressions.rationale: The query shape is fixed and all record values are D1 bindings.

allowedNonLiteralExpressions.executionContract: single returned statement for an atomic validation batch
allowedNonLiteralExpressions.rationale: The query shape is fixed and all record values are D1 bindings.

allowedNonLiteralExpressions.staticAuthority: fixed event-column array, matching placeholder count, and server-owned completion predicate
allowedNonLiteralExpressions.executionContract: single insert-select guarded by exact trip identity and completion state
allowedNonLiteralExpressions.rationale: Only reviewed identifiers and placeholder syntax are interpolated; record values remain bindings.

allowedNonLiteralExpressions.staticAuthority: fixed provenance-column array and matching server-generated placeholder list
allowedNonLiteralExpressions.executionContract: single insert-select guarded by exact completed trip identity
allowedNonLiteralExpressions.rationale: Only reviewed identifiers and placeholder syntax are interpolated; record values remain bindings.
The reconciliation artifact must include every event for one bound activation.
The reconciliation artifact must include every correction for one bound activation.

multiRowReadContracts.rationale: Saved locations are included completely in the authenticated portability export.
Gear profiles are included completely in the authenticated portability export.
Trips are intentionally complete for authenticated portability; the default-off asynchronous packager moves this complete read off the request path when activated.
Only public-copy rows derived from the authenticated owner's trips enter the portability export.
Forecast impression records are required for the authenticated owner's complete export.
Validation provenance is required for the authenticated owner's complete export.
Pilot events remain owner-bound and complete for authenticated portability.
Recruitment records remain owner-bound and complete for authenticated portability.
Corrections remain owner-bound and complete for authenticated portability.
